Message.title: Message
Message.description: An anonymous message sent into the pool.

senderId.description: The anonymous auth UID of the sender.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the message was created.

reports.description: Number of times this message was reported.

randomId.description: A random float used for O(1) random message retrieval.

/messages/{messageId}.description: Collection of anonymous messages in the global pool.
